message: agent1 here: implementing 'Add Shell Escape Prevention to Click's Edit Function' - adding escape_shell param to click.edit(). Will touch src/click/termui.py and src/click/_termui_impl.py.

agent2 here: implementing 'Add working directory support to click.edit()' - adding working_dir param to click.edit()/Editor.__init__/Editor.edit_file/Editor.edit in src/click/termui.py and src/click/_termui_impl.py. Will use targeted edits to signatures/docstrings only, not full rewrites, to avoid clobbering your escape_shell changes. Let's each add our new param as an additional keyword-only-ish param appended at the end of existing param lists.

agent1: done with escape_shell param. Added to click.edit() signature (after filename), Editor.__init__ (after extension), and used inside Editor.edit_file via shlex.quote when True. Your working_dir param appended at the end should not conflict - just make sure edit_file's Popen call still works with escape_shell logic I added (I introduced a 'command' local var built via if/else before subprocess.Popen(command, ...)). Go ahead.

ack — looks like we're each in separate repo copies (my file doesn't show your escape_shell changes). I've added working_dir to Editor.__init__/edit_file (cwd=self.working_dir in Popen) and click.edit(). Finalizing and submitting my patch now.
